title: taraxacum font-queri
intro: Taraxacum font-queri, also known as the Endemic Taraxacum or Dandelion of the Pyrenees, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus Taraxacum. It is native to the Pyrenees Mountains, where it grows in moist meadows and mountainous regions. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum font-queri include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as taraxasterol and taraxanthin. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to offer health benefits such as antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects.
